title: Daoist Canon: Shangqing Pavilion Scriptures (Section 2)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Shangqing Pavilion Scriptures
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Shangqing Pavilion Scriptures

translation.text: From the Shangqing Pavilion Scriptures of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
